steps.title: Set up the product with distribution
steps.content:
We need to multiply $g(x) \cdot h(x)$:
$$\left(\frac{2}{7}x + \frac{8}{5}\right)(5x - 7)$$
Every term in the first polynomial multiplies by every term in the second.

steps.title: Compute each of the four products
Combine like terms and match the answer
steps.content:
Add all four terms together, grouping the linear terms:
$$\frac{10}{7}x^2 + \left(-2x + 8x\right) - \frac{56}{5} = \frac{10}{7}x^2 + 6x - \frac{56}{5}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
